LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALI BAALOUACH'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER GRANTING SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. DENIED. MR. BAALOUACH HAS NOT PRESENTED ANY NEW LAW, FACTS OR CIRCUMSTANCES WARRANTING RECONSIDERATION. THE STATUTORY DEADLINES FOR AN ANTI-SLAPP MOTION ARE NOT ARBITRARY. THE ANTI-SLAPP MOTION DOES NOT VIOLATE MR. BAALOUACH'S RIGHT TO PETITION. CHICAGO TITLE IS AWARDED ATTORNEY FEES OF $1500. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA; NOT REPORTED

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE INSURANCE CORPORATION'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. CHICAGO TITLE IS AWARDED ATTORNEY FEES OF $3000 (10 HOURS AT $300 PER HOUR. CHICAGO TITLE SATISFIED ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT NON-INCIDENTAL ALLEGATIONS OF EACH CLAIM ARISE OUT OF ACTIVITY PROTECTED BY THE ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE. EVEN CONSIDERING HIS LATE-FILED OPPOSITION, MR. BAALOUACH HAS NOT PROVIDED ANY EVIDENCE TO SATISFY HIS BURDEN THAT THERE IS MINIMAL MERIT TO EITHER OF HIS CLAIMS. THE AMOUNT OF FEES SOUGHT WAS REDUCED BECAUSE THE HOURS CLAIMED WERE EXCESSIVE FOR THE WORK REFLECTED IN THE MOVING PAPERS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

Plaintiff Ali Baalouach'S Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JULIAN T. LASTOWSKI, ESQ., FIDELITY NATIONAL LAW GROUP, 925.930.9550, FOR DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. plaintiff Ali Baalouach'S Motion For Reconsideration of order granting special motion to strike complaint. Denied. Mr. Baalouach has not presented any new law, facts or circumstances warranting reconsideration. The statutory deadlines for an anti-SLAPP motion are not arbitrary. The anti-SLAPP motion does not violate Mr. Baalouach's right to petition. Chicago Title is awarded attorney fees of $1500. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not reported

MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ALI BAALOUACH'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION - To be heard at 9:30 am on the Law & Motion calendar. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin; Not reported =302/JPT

Plaintiff Ali Baalouach'S Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Continued To Aug-30-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Ali Baalouach'S Motion For Reconsideration is Continued on the court's own motion to August 30, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to be heard by Judge Kahn. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JULIAN T. LASTOWSKI, TEL. NO. (925) 930-9550 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE INSURANCE CORPORATION'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Granted. Chicago Title is awarded attorney fees of $3000 (10 hours at $300 per hour. Chicago Title satisfied its burden of showing that non-incidental allegations of each claim arise out of activity protected by the anti-SLAPP statute. Even considering his late-filed opposition, Mr. Baalouach has not provided any evidence to satisfy his burden that there is minimal merit to either of his claims. The amount of fees sought was reduced because the hours claimed were excessive for the work reflected in the moving papers. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Not reported.
